afterSnapshot.name: ROUTE_DEFAULT_SPEED_KNOTS
afterSnapshot.description: Default boat speed (knots) used for route-plan ETA when the request omits speed. Tunable.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Route ETA needs a sensible default cruising speed.
implementation: 5 kn is a realistic average sailing speed; kept as config so users can tune it.
